narrative:
Loudonville-Perrysville Ex Vill Sd (Ashland) exempted village school district has 5,068 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
